name: OmniAb, Inc.
business: OmniAb, Inc. licenses cutting-edge discovery research technology to pharmaceutical and biotech companies and academic institutions to enable the discovery of next-generation therapeutics. Its technology platform creates and screens diverse antibody repertoires using proprietary engineered transgenic animals to identify fully human antibodies.

exposures.sentence: OmniAb, Inc. licenses cutting-edge discovery research technology to pharmaceutical and biotech companies and academic institutions to enable the discovery of next-generation therapeutics.

catalysts.sentence: As part of our efforts to enhance the partner experience, we launched OmniHub in December 2024.
In 2025 we launched OmniUltra that extends our platform beyond traditional antibody modalities into the peptide space, enabling multiple therapeutic applications.

catalysts.event: Launch of xPloration Partner Access Program
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we launched the xPloration Partner Access Program, under which our partners can purchase the xPloration instrument to enhance their capabilities in antibody discovery and development.

On August 26, 2025, we completed a private placement (August 2025 PIPE) of 21,254,106 shares of our common stock at a price of $1.40 per share or, with respect to any purchaser that was an officer, director, employee or consultant of the Company, $1.85 per share.

tamClaims.claim: Approved antibody-based therapeutics accounted for approximately $250 billion in sales in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2023, approved antibody-based therapeutics accounted for approximately $250 billion in sales, according to data published by Clarivate Analytics Cortellis.

tamClaims.claim: Antibody-based therapeutic sales are expected to surpass $330 billion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: Furthermore, according to Clarivate, antibody-based therapeutic sales are expected to surpass $330 billion by 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Over 90% of all approved antibody drugs have been derived from natural immune systems.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Antibody Society Database of Antibody Regulatory Approvals, as of December 22, 2024, it is estimated that over 90% of all approved antibody drugs have been derived from natural immune systems

tamClaims.claim: Monoclonal antibodies have a 12.1% likelihood of receiving market authorization from Phase 1, higher than small molecules at 7.5%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to BIO's Clinical Development Success Rates and Contributing Factors 2011-2020, which summarizes a study of over 9,000 drugs being developed for the U.S. market, monoclonal antibodies and monoclonal antibody conjugate drugs have had a 12.1% likelihood of receiving market authorization from the start of Phase 1 clinical trials.
